title: tax — declared entitlements
description: Eight entitlement keys. `tax_capture` is the boolean master gate. `tax_provider_slot` caps provider configs per tenant. `tax_advanced_providers` unlocks Avalara + Stripe Tax on Medium+. `tax_jurisdiction_custom` unlocks per-tenant custom jurisdictions on Enterprise. `tax_exemption_management` (Small+) enables the certificate workflow. `tax_multi_currency` (Medium+) enables multiple source_currency values. `tax_annual_report` (Small+) enables the annual summary export. `tax_extended_retention` (Enterprise) extends calculation retention from 7y to 10y.

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is invisible: no rate CRUD, no provider CRUD, no calculation. All tiers get this on — Small tenants get a reduced provider set (NativeCalculator only) via tax_advanced_providers = 0.
enforcedBy: TaxCalculationObserver refuses calculation when the gate is closed
SDUI tax surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'tax.core'

entitlements.description: How many tax provider configs a tenant can have. Small: 1 (NativeCalculator only). Medium: 3. Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on provider config create; released on soft-delete.
Enables TaxJar + Avalara + Stripe Tax + Custom Webhook providers. Small tenants get NativeCalculator only. Medium + Enterprise get the full 5 providers.
enforcedBy: TaxProviderConfigObserver.creating refuses when provider IN ('taxjar', 'avalara', 'stripe_tax', 'custom_webhook') AND gate is closed
SDUI provider picker filters the provider list per this gate

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables tenant-scoped custom jurisdictions beyond the platform reference set. Useful for niche subnational tax zones (e.g. free-trade zones, special economic zones, regional tourism taxes) not in the standard ISO 3166-2 catalog.
enforcedBy: TaxJurisdictionObserver.creating refuses when tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND gate is closed
SDUI custom-jurisdiction create screen hidden when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables the exemption certificate workflow. All tiers get this — tenants of any size may serve reseller / non-profit / educational customers.
enforcedBy: TaxExemptionObserver.creating refuses when gate is closed (fires MARKETING_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED-style 402)
SDUI exemption CRUD screens hidden when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables tax_calculations with source_currency values other than the tenant's default_region.currency. Small tenants are locked to a single currency (their region's default). Medium+ can compute tax on cross-currency transactions (customer paying in EUR against a USD-billed subscription, etc.).
enforcedBy: TaxCalculationObserver.creating refuses when source_currency != tenant.default_region.currency AND gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables the end-of-year annual tax summary export. All tiers get this — every tenant needs their tax summary for filing.
enforcedBy: SDUI annual-report screen hidden when gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends tax_calculations retention from 7 years (default) to 10 years. For finance regimes that require longer audit trails (some German + Italian + certain US state jurisdictions).
enforcedBy: PurgeExpiredCalculationsJob checks this gate + applies 10-year retention when set
